The '''mayflii''' was a two-meter long, green [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] creature, native to the forest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. They laid eggs in the swamp.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
